# Business Requirements Document (BRD)

## Document Control
| Document Information | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Document Title | Business Requirements Document |
| Document Number | BRD-[Project ID]-[Version] |
| Version | 1.0 |
| Status | [Draft/Under Review/Approved/Completed] |
| Creation Date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Last Modified | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Document Owner | [Name, Title] |

### Version History
| Version | Date | Description of Changes | Author | Approved By |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0.1 | YYYY-MM-DD | Initial draft | [Name] |  |
| 1.0 | YYYY-MM-DD | First approved version | [Name] | [Name] |

### Approvals
| Name | Title/Role | Signature | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Approver Name] | [Title/Role] |  | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

## 1. Executive Summary
### 1.1 Purpose
[Concise statement of the problem or opportunity being addressed.]

**Example**
*This BRD defines the business requirements for the [Project Name], addressing customer onboarding
inefficiencies and enabling 24-hour turnaround for account creation.*

### 1.2 Project Overview
[Brief description of project scope and strategic importance.]

### 1.3 Key Stakeholders
[List stakeholders, roles, and interests.]

### 1.4 Expected Business Benefits
[Summarize key benefits and expected outcomes.]

---

## 2. Business Objectives and Success Criteria
### 2.1 Business Goals
| Goal ID | Description | Metrics/KPIs | Target Value | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| G-01 | [Goal] | [Metric] | [Target] | [High/Medium/Low] |

**Example**
| Goal ID | Description | Metrics/KPIs | Target Value | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| G-01 | Increase customer satisfaction | CSAT score | 4.5/5 by Q4 | High |
| G-02 | Reduce onboarding time | Avg. onboarding duration | 24 hours by Q3 | High |

### 2.2 Success Criteria
| ID | Success Criterion | Measurement Method | Target | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SC-01 | [Criterion] | [Method] | [Target] | [Owner] |

**Example**
| ID | Success Criterion | Measurement Method | Target | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SC-01 | 99.9% system uptime | Monitoring tools | Monthly uptime ≥ 99.9% | IT Ops |
| SC-02 | Reduce manual entry | Time-tracking study | 80% reduction | Operations |

### 2.3 Critical Success Factors
[List factors critical to success.]

---

## 3. Current State Analysis
### 3.1 Current Business Process
[Describe current process flows, pain points, and inefficiencies.]

### 3.2 Systems and Tools
| System/Tool | Purpose | Current Limitations | Integration Requirements |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [System] | [Purpose] | [Limitations] | [Requirements] |

**Example**
| System/Tool | Purpose | Current Limitations | Integration Requirements |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Legacy CRM | Customer management | No mobile access | Migration & API integration |
| ERP | Financials | Batch-only updates | Near real-time sync |

### 3.3 Pain Points and Challenges
[List key challenges to address.]

---

### 4.1 Desired Business Process
[Describe future state process improvements and workflows.]

### 4.2 Improvement Opportunities
[List opportunities and how they will be addressed.]

### 4.3 Expected Outcomes
[Provide quantitative and qualitative outcomes.]

---

### 5.1 Stakeholder Identification
| Stakeholder Group | Representatives | Role in Project | Interest Level | Influence Level | Engagement Strategy |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Group] | [Names] | [Role] | [High/Medium/Low] | [High/Medium/Low] | [Strategy] |

### 5.2 Stakeholder Needs and Expectations
[Summarize needs, expectations, and concerns.]

### 5.3 Stakeholder Communication Plan
[Outline engagement approach, cadence, and channels.]

---

## 6. Business Requirements
### 6.1 Functional Requirements
| Req ID | Requirement Description | Priority | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FR-01 | [Requirement] | [High/Medium/Low] | [Source] | [Criteria] |

**Example**
| Req ID | Requirement Description | Priority | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FR-01 | Allow users to search customers by name, ID, or phone | High | Customer Service | Successful search for each criterion |
| FR-02 | Generate monthly sales reports by region | Medium | Sales Management | Reports available by 5th business day |

### 6.2 Non-Functional Requirements
| Req ID | Requirement Type | Requirement Description | Priority | Measurement Criteria |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| NFR-01 | [Performance/Security/etc.] | [Requirement] | [High/Medium/Low] | [Criteria] |

**Example**
| Req ID | Requirement Type | Requirement Description | Priority | Measurement Criteria |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| NFR-01 | Performance | Search results load within 3 seconds | High | Load test results |
| NFR-02 | Security | Encrypt PII at rest and in transit | High | Security audit |

### 6.3 Business Rules
| Rule ID | Business Rule | Description | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BR-01 | [Rule] | [Description] | [Source] |

**Example**
| Rule ID | Business Rule | Description | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BR-01 | Credit approval | Orders > $10,000 require manager approval | Finance Policy |

### 6.4 Constraints and Assumptions
**Constraints**
| Constraint ID | Constraint Description | Impact |
| --- | --- | --- |
| C-01 | [Constraint] | [Impact] |

**Assumptions**
| Assumption ID | Assumption Description | Validation Method |
| --- | --- | --- |
| A-01 | [Assumption] | [Validation] |

### 10.1 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
| KPI ID | KPI Description | Baseline | Target | Measurement Method | Measurement Frequency |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| KPI-01 | [KPI] | [Baseline] | [Target] | [Method] | [Frequency] |

## 11. Appendices
### 11.1 Glossary
[Define terms and acronyms.]

### 11.2 Reference Documents

### 11.3 Supporting Materials
[Include surveys, interview summaries, or research.]

---

## Guidelines for Completing This Template
1. Be specific and avoid vague requirements.
2. Focus on business needs rather than technical implementation.
3. Prioritize requirements for delivery planning.
4. Include measurable acceptance criteria for each requirement.
5. Validate requirements and assumptions with stakeholders.
6. Keep the document updated as requirements evolve.
